title: Foiled Music Discs: Replayed
description: Adds 19 unique music discs to Minecraft.
body:
[![BisectHosting - Code tinfoilknight_ for 25% off](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/0b2edca5-f10a-4d54-94fb-6422d9278a2d.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/tinfoilknight_)

Once again, it has been reworked, and is better than ever. Over the course of many years, I've reworked this mod over and over again, under the names _"Zenuroo's Mo' Discs"_ and _"Boba's Extra Music Discs"_. But now, this is (hopefully) the final rework of this project. I welcome you, to Foiled Music Discs
#
Foiled Music Discs adds 19 unique discs to Minecraft, all of which can be obtained around your world. These music discs all also sound amazing, and fit the vibe of current Minecraft music discs. This mod does not add any new mechanics, or structures, but rather depends on the ones that already exist.
#

<details>
<summary>Music Discs</summary>

### Aether
_by Redstonian [Emboar]_

Can be found in **Stongholds**

### Birch Bop

_by The Bling-Bling Cheese_

Can be found in **Village Weaponsmiths**

### Bricks

_by Gwyd_

Can be found in **Village Weaponsmiths**

### Charlie

_by The Bling-Bling Cheese_

Can be found in **Dungeons**

### Cheese

_by Lost Angel_

Can be found in **Strongholds**

### Chemistry

_by Lost Angel_

Can be found in **Dungeons**



### Coldrave

_by Epicuras_

Can be found in **Igloos**



### Deepstate

_by Epicuras_

Can be found in **Dungeons**

_Also obtainable if a Skeleton kills a Creeper_


### Fort-stress

_by The Bling-Bling Cheese_

Can be found in **Nether Fortresses**



### Fungus

_by A Peace Of Pie_

Can be found in **Bastions**



### Glamorous

_by A Peace of Pie_

Can be found by **Fishing**



### Ice

_by PikPik36_

Can be found in **Igloos**



### Lush

_by Terraainn_

Can be found in **Strongholds**



### Magma

_by zoo937_

Can be found in **Ruined Portals**



### Mansion

_by Apro101_

Can be found in **Woodland Mansions** and **Dungeons**



### Over

_by Tandem Music_

Can be found in **Dungeons**

_Also obtainable if a Skeleton kills a Creeper_



### PANIC ATTACK

_by Libra_

Can be found in **Village Weaponsmiths**



### Vibrate

_by Black Jacket_

Can be found in **Ancient Cities**

</details>


Thank you so much to everyone who has Music Discs in this mod for giving me permission to use them
